titleStmt.title: SII 8.497: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 497. (A.R. No. 198 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakaraiyāṇṭu 1000 2 100 4 10 2- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa raudrisam
vatsara ttu vriścikanā yaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu triti yaiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrnāṭṭu tirukkā
ḷattiāṉa mummuṭicoḻapurattu mahātevanāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkaicciyaṉeṉ
tirumaṇikkeṅkaiyil Uṭaiyār tirumaṇikkeṅkaiuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiluk
ku vaṭakkuttiruviti melciṟakil kūṟṟutaittāṉ comanātatevarmaṭam nilam patiṉo
ruaṭikku vaṭakku tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyār maṭam nilam Irupatteḻaṭikku teṟkku Uṭaiyā
r tirumaṇikkeṅkaiuṭaiya nāyaṉār paṇṭāramaṭattil vaṭakkaṭaiya muṉṉāḷil co
parāṇṭārkku periyamahātevarāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkaicciyar kuṭutta nilamāy Ivar
kkup piṉṉai tevāṇṭārkkuāy Ivarpakkal velneṭuṅkaṇṇinār koṇṭu
Ivarkkup piṉpu Ivar peraṉ kāḷattinātaṉum Ivaṉ taṅkai velneṭuṅkaṇṇiyum
cokkanāyakiyum nilamāṉa Iṉnilam muppatteḻaṭikku talaimāṟu parithāpisamva
tsara ttu vaiykācimātattu Uṭaiyār catumukanāyaṉār koyilukku teṟ
ku kamukutirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakku Orucciṟakiṉ tiruvītiyil maṭaṅkaḷile
Inta kāḷattinātaṉukku Irupattunālu Aṭiyum Iṉṉāyanār caṉṉatik
ku teṟkuciṟakil maṭaṅkaḷile Inta velneṭuṅkaṇṇikku Irupattoraṭiyum Iṉṉāyanār caṉṉatiyil
melciṟakil maṭaṅkaḷile Inta cokkanāyakikku patināluaṭiyum Āka Ivarkaḷukku kuṭuttu paḻaiyapaṭi
ye paṇṭāramaṭattuṭaṉe Inta muppatteḻaṭiyum kūṭṭineṉ mahātevanāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkaicciyaṉe
ṉ Ivai mahātevanāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkaicciyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai velneṭuṅkaṇṇiyār kāḷattinātaṉ Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai kūramuṭaiyār
Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivom tirumalaimāheśvararom— Ippaṭi Aṟivom Āṟukottu māheśvararo m—ippaṭi Aṟivom pattukkuṭiyil paṭṭakaḷom—
Ippaṭi Aṟivom Eṭṭukkottu taṇṭanāyakam ceyvārkaḷom—ippaṭi Aṟivom Iḷaiyaniyāyattārom—ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirukkāḷattiācāriya
ṉeṉ—ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirukkāḷattikollaneṉ—ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vallāṉaiveṉṟaācāriyaṉ mārāṇṭaiyeṉ—ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirukkāḷattitaṭ
ṭāṉ nallapiḷḷaiyeṉ
Ippaṭikku Ivai tikkāṉaiāṇṭār mutalippiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāḷattinātaṉ Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai keṅkaṉ Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai tirukkāḷattiāṇṭār paṇṭārattu
talattār Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai tevarkaḷ Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai cellappiḷḷai Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai koyil kāttār Eḻuttu—
Ippaṭikku Ivai tirukkāḷattiāṇṭār tavapperuntevuceytār Eḻuttu—ippaṭikku Ivai tirukkāḷattiāṇṭār kaliyukameyyar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 8.497 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
